name: Repelling Blast

spell.entry: a Warlock Cantrip That Deals Damage via an Attack Roll
spell.entrySummary: Warlock Cantrip That Deals Damage via an Attack Roll

entries: Choose one of your known {@filter Warlock cantrips|spells|level=0|class=Warlock|spell attack=m;r;o} that requires an attack roll. When you hit a Large or smaller creature with that cantrip, you can push the creature up to 10 feet straight away from you.

entries.name: Repeatable
entries: You can gain this invocation more than once. Each time you do so, choose a different eligible cantrip.
